role: Decompose approved requirements into actionable sprint tasks with estimates, dependencies, and agent assignments

requirement_decomposition.description: Break a single TRD requirement into 1-N atomic tasks

tools.LangGraph: Multi-step agentic decomposition workflows (requirement in, task tree out)

rules: Each task completable by a single agent
Each task has clear Definition of Done (DoD)
No task spans more than 1 sprint
Backend API task always paired with Flutter integration task
Every dev task gets a sibling Code Review task (mandatory, cannot be skipped)
Every dev task gets a sibling QA task (mandatory, runs AFTER code review passes)
Task is NOT complete until full pipeline passes: Dev → Code Review → QA → Commit
Code Review task depends_on Dev task; QA task depends_on Code Review task; Commit depends_on QA task

per_task_pipeline.description: Each dev sub-task MUST have 3 dependent tasks auto-generated

example.S1-01-dev: Python_Dev_Lead implements HT SSO Login API
example.S1-01-qa: Python_QA runs unit, integration, contract, security tests

sprint_sequencing.description: Order tasks into sprints respecting the dependency graph

tools.NetworkX: Critical Path Method (CPM) to estimate sprint duration
tools.Linear_API_or_Jira_API: Programmatic sprint creation and backlog management

rules: Backend API before Flutter integration within same sprint
Per-task pipeline order within sprint: Dev → Code Review → QA → Commit (sequential, gated)
Code Review runs immediately after Dev completes (NOT batched at sprint end)
QA runs immediately after Code Review passes (NOT batched at sprint end)
Cross-stack handshake tasks flagged for Master_Orchestrator
Max 8-10 dev tasks per sprint per stack (each generates 3 dependent pipeline tasks)

complexity_estimation.description: Estimate task effort using historical data and LLM analysis

tools.Claude_API: LLM-assisted story point estimation using codebase context

scale.XL: 16+ hours — MUST split into L or smaller before assignment

complexity_estimation.method: T-shirt sizing with Fibonacci refinement (S→1, M→3, L→5, XL→8+)

parallelism_detection.description: Identify which tasks can run concurrently

tools.Graphlib_python: Identify independent subgraphs in dependency DAG
tools.NetworkX: Parallel group extraction from task graph

cross_stack_flagging.description: Mark tasks that require Asynchronous Handshake
triggers: New data model impacts Flutter models

scope_change_handling.description: Re-plan when PRD or requirements change

tools.openapi_diff: Detect breaking changes in API contract

work_breakdown_structure.description: Hierarchical decomposition from epics to implementable tasks
work_breakdown_structure.method: Epic → Feature → User Story → Task (max 4-8 hours each)
